query:
SELECT pv.id, pv.variant_code, pv.variant_name, pv.created_at,
       pb.id as box_id, pb.length, pb.width, pb.height, pb.cbm, pb.gross_weight, pb.net_weight
FROM product_variants pv
LEFT JOIN package_boxes pb ON pb.variant_id = pv.id
WHERE pv.variant_name LIKE '%完整功能测试%'
ORDER BY pv.created_at DESC
LIMIT 5;
